VAL-FOUND-005.evidence: grep for Effect patterns (Effect.gen, Context.GenericTag, Layer.succeed, Layer.effect, Layer.mergeAll, Data.TaggedError) returned 30+ matches across packages/utils/src/. Key files: layers.ts exports makeServiceLayer (wraps Layer.succeed), makeEffectServiceLayer (wraps Layer.effect), composeLayers (wraps Layer.mergeAll). errors.ts defines 4 typed error classes via Data.TaggedError. runtime.ts provides makeRuntime using ManagedRuntime. Effect is the architectural backbone for service composition, not just installed.

VAL-FOUND-006.evidence: composeLayers (exported from packages/utils/src/layers.ts line 82) is an alias for Layer.mergeAll — a Layer combinator that merges multiple service layers into one. Tests in layers.test.ts demonstrate: (1) composeLayers(LoggerLive, CounterLive) merging two independent services into ComposedLive, (2) Layer.provide(FormatterLive, LoggerLive) wiring dependent services. A top-level composed layer pattern is exported and tested.

VAL-FOUND-007.evidence: All 4 error classes (NotFoundError, UnauthorizedError, ValidationError, ServiceError) use Data.TaggedError with explicit type parameters. grep for 'Effect<.*unknown' returned zero matches — no service uses unknown in the error channel. makeEffectServiceLayer signature is <Id, S, E, R>(tag, effect): Layer.Layer<Id, E, R> with generic E, not unknown. TypeScript compilation passes with strict mode (tsc --noEmit) across all 3 packages (@nivalis/utils, @nivalis/ai, @nivalis/web) — 0 errors.

VAL-FOUND-019.evidence: packages/utils/src/index.ts has 8 named exports: NotFoundError, ServiceError, UnauthorizedError, ValidationError (from errors.ts), composeLayers, makeEffectServiceLayer, makeServiceLayer (from layers.ts), makeRuntime (from runtime.ts). TypeScript compilation passes. However, ALL 8 exports are Effect-related utilities. The package contains zero general-purpose helper functions (no string/array/date/math/object utilities). Only 3 source files exist: errors.ts, layers.ts, runtime.ts — all Effect-specific.
issues: The package exports only Effect-related utilities. The assertion requires 'at least one general-purpose helper function' (non-Effect), but none exist. A general helper (e.g., cn(), debounce, formatDate, deepMerge) needs to be added to satisfy this assertion.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-FOUND-005, VAL-FOUND-006, VAL-FOUND-007), 1 failed (VAL-FOUND-019: missing general-purpose helper — all exports are Effect-specific).
